implementation_summary: Added 5 AC-TEST-3 disjunction cases to walledGarden.test.ts (peer-in-both, peer-in-groups-only, peer-in-knownPeers-only, peer-in-neither, case-insensitive-knownPeers). Confirmed AC-TEST-4 already covered in welcomeSubscription.test.ts (valid Welcome → enqueue only, no auto-join; invalid → silent drop). Modified groups-contacts.spec.ts to add Bob's explicit Accept click before group-card assertion (AC-TEST-9). Created 4 new relay-suite e2e specs (groups-pull-only-invitation-accept, groups-pull-only-invitation-decline, groups-ever-known-survives-leave, groups-migration-backfill). All new specs follow groups-*.spec.ts naming convention for relay testMatch. Code inspections confirm AC-SEC-16 through AC-OBS-5.
